title: True Power of Goety
description: True Power of Goety is a Minecraft Forge mod that bridges the gap between Goety and SlashBlade: Resharped, allowing Goety's summoned servants to wield the legendary katana weapons in combat.
body:
True Power of Goety is a Minecraft Forge mod that bridges the gap between Goety and SlashBlade: Resharped, allowing Goety's summoned servants to wield the legendary katana weapons in combat.

Features
SlashBlade Integration: All summoned servants from Goety (Zombies, Skeletons, Wraiths, etc.) can now equip and use SlashBlade weapons
Automatic Combat AI: Servants will automatically detect enemies within range and perform slash attacks
Full Animation Support: Complete with slash effects, combo sequences, and visual feedback
Dynamic Targeting: Uses Goety's priority target system for intelligent enemy selection
Addon Compatible: Works with all Goety addon mods that extend the Summoned class
Requirements
Minecraft 1.20.1
Forge 47.4.8+
Goety (any version)
SlashBlade: Resharped (any version)
How It Works
Simply equip your summoned servants with any SlashBlade weapon in their main hand. The servants will automatically:

Detect hostile targets within attack range
Face toward their target
Execute slash attacks with proper animations
Maintain attack cooldowns for balanced combat
Compatibility
This mod is designed to be future-proof and compatible with:

All current and future Goety updates
Goety addon mods (Cataclysm Goety, etc.)
Any SlashBlade addon weapons
License
MIT License - Feel free to use in modpacks!
